description_long: This ornate clock features a classical design with a richly decorated base and a prominent round clock face at its center. The base is adorned with intricate sculptural details, including floral motifs and possibly cherubic or mythological figures, rendered in a gold or bronze-like finish. A reclining human figure, likely cast in metal, is positioned atop the clock, adding to its decorative appeal. The clock face is white with black numerals and delicate hands, surrounded by a metallic bezel. The rear and sides of the clock reveal a textured, possibly velvet or fabric-like backing in a deep red color, contrasting with the metallic elements. The overall construction suggests a heavy, solid build, typical of antique mantel clocks designed for display in elegant interiors.
description: An ornate, gold-toned mantel clock with a sculpted base, reclining figure, and a white round clock face, accented by red velvet-like backing. Rich decorative details and classical motifs make it a striking display piece.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sculpted floral and figure details along the base and side, with the red backing partially visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the round white clock face, black numerals, and the reclining figure atop the ornate gold base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view emphasizing the red velvet-like backing and the depth of the clock's structure.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full extent of the red backing and the rounded form of the clock's body.
attribute_face_design: Round white face with black numerals, thin black hands, and a metallic bezel; minimal decoration on the face itself.
